title: Raw single-end RNA-seq FASTQ from murine neutrophils (Il1r2 WT vs KO)
author: Magrini, Elena
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-zero
description: This dataset contains raw single-end RNA sequencing (RNA-seq) data (compressed FASTQ files) generated from Mus musculus neutrophils, comparing Il1r2 wild-type (WT, n=3) and Il1r2 knockout (KO, n=4) samples. Sample information (genotype and replicate) is provided in samples_metadata.csv.
steps_raw: This dataset contains raw single-end RNA sequencing (RNA-seq) data (compressed FASTQ files) generated from Mus musculus neutrophils, comparing Il1r2 wild-type (WT, n=3) and Il1r2 knockout (KO, n=4) samples. Sample information (genotype and replicate) is provided in samples_metadata.csv.
